message:
fix(membrane): reorder arena free to write quarantine state before epoch bump

Move bump_tls_cache_epoch() call after setting slot.state = Quarantined
instead of before. This ensures the Release fence in the epoch bump
happens after the quarantine state write, so any thread that Acquires
the new epoch value is guaranteed to see the Quarantined state.

Previously the epoch was bumped before the state transition, creating a
window where a reader could see the new epoch but still observe the
slot as Allocated, defeating the TLS cache invalidation.

This is the companion fix to the Relaxed→Acquire/Release ordering
upgrade in tls_cache.rs — together they close the visibility gap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
